scripts.db:deploy: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.migration:clients: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/sqlite.schema.prisma
